text: A vehicle with four wheels used for personal transport on roads.
An automobile, typically powered by an internal combustion engine or electric motor.
A long, articulated road vehicle used to carry many passengers between stops.
A two-wheeled, pedal-driven personal transport device.
A medical practitioner who diagnoses and treats illness.
A physician trained to provide medical care and prescribe medication.
A trained nurse who assists with patient care in hospitals or clinics.
An academic who has earned a doctorate in a non-medical field.
A film, typically released in cinemas, that tells a story through moving images.
A motion picture, screened in theatres or streamed online.
A short video clip recorded on a smartphone and shared online.
A live theatrical performance staged in front of an audience.
A building used as a private residence by an individual or family.
A dwelling, typically detached, where people live and sleep.
A small wooden structure used to store gardening tools.
A high-rise apartment building containing many separate flats.
The art of arranging sounds in time to produce a composition through melody, harmony, and rhythm.
Songs and instrumental pieces, performed live or recorded, that people listen to for enjoyment.
Ambient noise from machinery and traffic in a busy urban environment.
A spoken-word podcast covering interviews with public figures.
